_purpose: Pre-registered multiple-testing protocol for the hyp_growth_v2_h1..h5 variant family. Authored 2026-05-01 BEFORE any IS leg has been run. Anchors the OOS-eligibility margin, selection rule, and anomaly-halt rule so post-hoc HARKing is not possible. Companion to the 5 hyp_growth_v2_h{1..5}_20260501.json request files.

ablation_design.h5_minus_h2: isolates universe-filter contribution (H5 has H4 universe; H2 has baseline universe) AND composite_kind contribution (H5 zscore vs H2 rank). Confounded by both. To cleanly isolate universe alone, compare H4 vs H1 (both have rank_weighted, same components, only universe differs).
ablation_design.h5_minus_h4: isolates defensive-component contribution AND composite_kind contribution. Confounded by both. To cleanly isolate component alone, compare H2 vs H1 (both have rank_weighted, baseline universe, only components differ).
ablation_design.h2_minus_h1: clean isolation of defensive-component effect (rank_weighted, baseline universe).
ablation_design.h4_minus_h1: clean isolation of universe-tightening effect (rank_weighted, 3-leg GARP).
ablation_design.h5_minus_h2_minus_h4_plus_h1: approximation of composite_kind effect (zscore vs rank), isolated via difference-in-differences. Imperfect because H5 stacks BOTH H2 and H4 changes; difference-in-differences assumes additivity which the H5 weakest_assumption pre-registration acknowledges is unlikely to hold.

step_0_backup.command: cp -r data/factor_registry data/factor_registry.bak_20260501 && cp -r data/holdout_seals data/holdout_seals.bak_20260501

step_1_pre_flight_registry_check.purpose: Confirm all 6 distinct factor_ids across H1-H5 are present in factor_registry as is_current=True before authoring runs.
step_1_pre_flight_registry_check.verified_status: all 6 present, is_current=True, status=draft (acceptable; baseline used same status)

step_3_verify_seals_untouched.fail_action: ABORT family — do not run any IS leg until seals are verified untouched.

step_4_run_is_legs.rationale: Halt-on-success introduces selection-on-IS bias against later variants. Run all 5 IS legs to enable clean within-family comparison.

step_5_score_concerns_and_decide_is_gate.per_variant: Read the variant-specific pre_registered_concerns; score each against measured IS evidence; write gate_concern_scores.json; approve/reject/quarantine the IS gate.

oos_eligibility_margin.rationale: Tighter than gate floor because (a) A-share long-only OOS metrics historically degrade 5-15% Sharpe vs IS, so a variant that JUST passes IS gate is unlikely to pass OOS; (b) OOS budget is one shot per design_hash and this commitment fixes the bar before any measurement. Margin is anchored to general OOS-shrinkage priors, NOT to the specific IS measurements of this family.

selection_rule.primary: Among IS-eligible variants (those passing both the gate floor and the OOS-eligibility margin above), select the one with highest deflated_sharpe.
selection_rule.tie_break_3: Prefer rank_weighted over zscore_weighted (closer to baseline composite_kind).
selection_rule.result: EXACTLY ONE variant claims OOS. Non-survivors keep seals untouched and may be re-tested as separate hypotheses later.

anomaly_halt_rule.rationale: Step-function jumps from baseline (rank_icir 0.466, DSR 1.0, DD 0.46, turnover 11.8) signal possible leakage, build mismatch, or a measurement bug. Baseline values bound the plausible range for related variants.
anomaly_halt_rule.action: STOP family execution; do NOT score concerns; investigate. Resume only after root-cause is identified and ruled benign.

escalation_if_zero_eligible.trigger: 0 of 5 variants pass both IS gate floor AND OOS-eligibility margin
escalation_if_zero_eligible.action: Do NOT claim OOS on any seal; preserve all 5 design_hashes for future re-testing under a different family. Move to Phase 5 of the v2 plan: Path A (strategy_improvement profile factor-mix discovery) first; Path B (custom PortfolioOptimizer integration) second; Path C (validation v2 schema extension) third — Path C requires its own plan.

after_family_completion: ONE update to project_state.md summarizing all 5 IS verdicts + the OOS outcome of the survivor (or escalation taken).
ONE post-hoc summary in workspace/outputs/hyp_growth_v2_summary_<date>.md covering ablation findings (using the ablation_design above).
Update CLAUDE.md hard invariants ONLY if a structural finding emerges (e.g., 'rank_weighted at TopK<100 produces >=10x turnover irrespective of rebalance cadence').

attestation: I, the agent authoring this commitment, attest that no IS leg of any of the 5 variants has been executed at the time of authoring. Any IS metrics referenced are exclusively from the rejected baseline hyp_growth_garp_3leg_20260428.
